q1.question: What is web hosting and why do I need it?
q1.answer: Web hosting stores your site files and makes them accessible online. Your domain points visitors to your site; hosting publishes it.

q2.question: How do I purchase a hosting plan?
q2.answer: Select a plan, add it to cart, and complete checkout. After payment, your hosting account is provisioned automatically.

q3.question: Can I migrate my existing website?
q3.answer: Yes. All plans include free migration support. Our team will guide you through the process.

q4.question: Should I use cPanel or Plesk?
q4.answer: cPanel is popular and beginner-friendly. Plesk excels at multi-site and Windows workloads. Each plan shows its panel type.

forbidden.hint2: Suspended accounts lose access until an administrator reactivates them.

server.description: Our team has been notified. You can retry the action, return to a safe page, or contact support with the reference details below if the problem persists.

boundary.description: A part of this page failed to render. Other areas may still work. Try refreshing or navigate away and back.

global.title: Critical error
global.description: The application encountered a critical failure. Please refresh the page. If this continues, clear site data or try another browser.
